2026-04-16T16:59:30.3591692Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-16T16:59:30.3592251Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-16T16:59:30.3592690Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-16T16:59:30.3593055Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-16T16:59:30.3593379Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-16T16:59:30.3593614Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-16T16:59:30.3593774Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-16T16:59:30.3593953Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-16T16:59:30.3594375Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-16T16:59:30.3594609Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-16T16:59:30.3594811Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-16T16:59:30.3595093Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-16T16:59:30.3595345Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
